notes: 3.11.61 — SUC KHOE DU LIEU dang DAI IM LANG (chot voi Sep — khong lam tab rieng): 6 phep kiem cot loi chay khi admin/KTT mo Dashboard, binh thuong VO HINH, co benh moi hien chip do/vang + so luong + bam mo danh sach (toi da 80 dong) + goi y noi xu ly: (1) so tien/phi nho bat thuong <10k/<1k VND (bat loi nuot nghin da luu), (2) phieu chi ho danh dau Da TT chua co payments (KTT ra soat), (3) phieu qua han duyet 14 ngay, (4) ma NV trung, (5) NV active thieu the luong hieu luc, (6) chung chi tau het han/45 ngay. Them phep = them 1 phan tu HEALTH_CHECKS. Rollback=3.10.41.
